summary: Completed comprehensive testing of football prediction app restructuring. Verified removal of filter tabs and league pills, confirmed league grouping with headers, bell icon implementation, and prediction functionality.
passed_tests: Backend API health check returns healthy status
Backend API /api/football/matches returns data with competitionEmblem field
No filter tabs visible (Top Matches, Popular, Top Live, Soon, Ended, Favorite correctly removed)
No league filter pills visible (All Matches, Live, UCL, etc. correctly removed)
Matches grouped by league with proper league headers (6 league sections found)
League headers show league logo, name, country, and > arrow icon
Match cards show bell icons instead of bookmark icons (111 bell buttons, 0 bookmark buttons)
Match cards show team crests and team names with VS in center
Match cards show three prediction bars side by side (111 sets of home/draw/away buttons)
PREDICT MATCH button visible on match cards (102 buttons found)
PREDICT MATCH button opens Advanced Options modal with all 4 sections
Banner carousel at top works correctly
Match cards show date, time, and countdown information
Advanced Options modal contains Exact Score, Smart Advice, Invite Friend, and Friends Activity sections
